tasks.title: Suppression chain orchestrator: fail-open zero value, phase ordering, critical/unknown severity floor

scenarios: A phase exception fails open to escalation
An unconfirmed suppression match fails open to escalation
A critical-severity reboot is never suppressed
An unknown-severity alert is never suppressed

tasks.title: Phase-1 dedup with grammar-validated timestamp boundary (reject future-dated / negative-age)

scenarios: A future-dated triage entry is rejected and the alert escalates
A negative-age triage entry is rejected and the alert escalates
A prior entry within the window is accepted for dedup evaluation

tasks.title: Blast-radius fold over the temporally-bounded suppression-policy registry

scenarios: A currently-valid suppression-policy record activates the fold
An active fold posts the child alert as a notice without a session
An expired suppression-policy record fails open
A stale-verified suppression-policy record fails open

tasks.title: Phase SR scheduled-reboot matcher over the live schedule registry with DST-correct window

scenarios: An on-schedule reboot with a live registered schedule is suppressed
An observing schedule does not suppress
A reboot outside the schedule window escalates
A critical reboot with a matching schedule is not suppressed

tasks.title: Host-agnostic known-transient and active-memory pattern match keyed on alert_rule

scenarios: A host-agnostic transient rule matches by alert rule
A transient rule does not match a different alert rule

tasks.title: Two-phase boot verifier: reopen and page on a non-clean boot after a suppressed reboot

scenarios: A dirty boot after a suppressed reboot reopens and pages
A clean systemd-reboot stays suppressed

tasks.title: Observe-before-live discovery and promotion writers for the schedule registry

scenarios: A schedule promotes to live after two in-window boots
A single in-window boot does not promote the schedule
A removed schedule drifts to disabled
